name: Chicken Pie Deluxe
recipeIngredient: 1 Can Cream Of Celery Soup, undiluted
1 1 1/2 cups Canned Or Boned Chicken, cut into large pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix stuffing and butter, reserving ¾ cup for the top. Spread reserved crumb mixture into the bottom of a 2-quart casserole dish.
2. Mix remaining ingredients and spread over the crumb layer.
3. Top with remaining crumbs.
4. Bake at 425°F for 15 to 20 minutes or until bubbly.
Serves 6
Source: "Mountain Measures" -- Junior League of Charleston, WA
ed. 1974
